textByHash.385ebc5c5bad697ed0f791a96f3aec73632bd4e6: Your guess is as good as mine. He was here until that earthquake. Then he suddenly just wandered off, like he was in some sort of trance.
textByHash.421cf55272df4a63d0063e85a2a7b3bd15c76a43: Hey there. Do you need something?
textByHash.4f47718e69f7f3ab9cdd221948d76e45a18f5ae4: Hey. Veos left something for you. Here you go.
textByHash.547b66617b1ac3b3068cfe4735d96dd460b03850: I guess I'll have to look after it until he comes back. I hope he won't be long. I'm not really cut out for this kind of thing.
textByHash.7033b2b6053aea62c82608746575399f9fbd66c4: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.
textByHash.8e43e1bda940b9a6e549148fb70304ee9ad9c2da: Hey there. If you need something, you should speak to Veos. I'm just the cabin boy.
textByHash.a78d85760408bc147784f30e5fd0c5d092769f22: Where would you like to go?
textByHash.e10e69bf0dc1701dfb4bfa901a56aa38654cc175: The one that got arrested? If she wants to board the ship she'll need to do it soon. We're nearly ready to cast off. I guess you could wait around and see if she shows up.
textByHash.ffb240046ca5674e6b76f4c175e038e16f837a46: I'm afraid that you're not eligible to travel to Great Kourend at the moment. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.
